parameters.query: SELECT lead_id, dify_dataset_id FROM lead_chat_mapping WHERE active = true ORDER BY lead_id

SELECT pf.id, pf.filename, pf.lead_id, pf.transcript_text FROM processed_files pf WHERE pf.status = 'completed' AND DATE(COALESCE(pf.file_date, pf.completed_at::date, pf.created_at::date)) = CURRENT_DATE AND pf.transcript_text IS NOT NULL AND (pf.dify_doc_id IS NULL OR pf.dify_doc_id = '') ORDER BY pf.lead_id, pf.id LIMIT 20
SELECT lead_id, chat_title, sender, message_text, message_date FROM chat_messages WHERE DATE(message_date) = CURRENT_DATE AND summary_sent = false ORDER BY lead_id, message_date LIMIT 500

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'glm-4-flash', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.content }], temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 2000, thinking: { type: 'disabled' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'glm-4-flash', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.content }], temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 2000, thinking: { type: 'disabled' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.doc_name, text: $json.summary, indexing_technique: 'high_quality', process_rule: { mode: 'automatic' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.doc_name, text: $json.summary, indexing_technique: 'high_quality', process_rule: { mode: 'automatic' } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO client_summaries (lead_id, source_type, summary_text, summary_date) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::date) RETURNING id
INSERT INTO client_summaries (lead_id, source_type, summary_text, summary_date) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::date) RETURNING id
UPDATE processed_files SET dify_doc_id = $1, summary_text = $2 WHERE id = ANY($3::int[])

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Prep Call DB Save').first().json.dify_doc_id }}||={{ $('Prep Call DB Save').first().json.summary }}||={{ '{' + ($('Prep Call DB Save').first().json.call_ids || []).join(',') + '}' }}

parameters.query: UPDATE chat_messages SET summary_sent = true WHERE lead_id = $1 AND DATE(message_date) = CURRENT_DATE
